# ona_service_account (List Resource)

Lists customer-managed Ona service accounts for the authenticated organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_service_account" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `search` (String) Search service accounts by name.
- `service_account_ids` (List of String) Service account IDs to include.
